title: Prevent repeated `cargo build` failure
statement: The recurring `cargo build` failure is caused or amplified by missing preconditions or unchanged retries.
expected_result: Matching `cargo build` attempts avoid repeated exit-code-101 failures without blocking valid executions.
instruction: Before running `cargo build`, verify its required preconditions. If it fails with exit code 101, do not retry it unchanged; inspect the failure and change the hypothesis or inputs first.
failure_cases: The command can fail transiently even when all preconditions are satisfied.
The advisory could interrupt a legitimate immediate retry.
exclusions: Do not block execution; this candidate is advisory until replay and shadow evaluation pass.
